response.justification: Bogdan has extensive leadership experience in senior roles, including Staff Software Engineer and Senior Developer positions at top-tier companies like Naver and Tencent. His background in open-source contributions, architectural design, and team mentorship aligns well with the Head of Development role. While his German proficiency is basic, his strong English skills and willingness to learn new technologies compensate. His deep technical expertise in multiple languages, systems, and frameworks demonstrates strong problem-solving and strategic thinking capabilities.
strengths: Extensive leadership experience in senior technical roles at globally recognized companies.
Strong open-source contributions and experience with complex system architectures.
Proven track record in team mentorship, technical project management, and strategic development.
concerns: German language proficiency is only at a basic level (needs C1 for the role).
Limited direct experience with UML modeling and reference frameworks mentioned in the job description.
No explicit mention of IT security, risk management, or compliance experience in the resume.

key_factors.factor: Experience with open-source technologies and Linux environments
